support_points: UIC public websites directory lists an ORION Project entry and links directly to https://www.orion-project.eu/.
claim_ceiling_helped: Shows that at least one named ORION consortium participant/sector body publicly points to an ORION project website beyond police and CORDIS surfaces.
still_not_safe: Directory listing alone is not procurement, deployment, legality, evaluation, or buyer-side proof.

support_points: Homepage states ORION aims, grant number 101225611, Horizon Europe action type, coordinator UBITECH, and AI/advanced-biometrics/privacy framing; browser snapshot shows objectives plus project facts.
claim_ceiling_helped: Adds a public project-controlled companion that restates project scope and pilot-facing framing across transport settings.
still_not_safe: Project website prose is still promotional/project-controlled, not an independent evaluation, procurement file, or legal review.

support_points: UIC article dated 2025-11-19 says ORION kicked off in Athens, gathered 21 organisations, and will validate through four pilot activities across different transport modes and border environments; it names UIC as railway end-user representative, railway-pilot co-organiser with Eurostar, and dissemination manager.
claim_ceiling_helped: Adds named pilot-setting and partner-role visibility from a consortium participant surface beyond police and CORDIS.
still_not_safe: Launch reporting does not prove operational deployment, effectiveness, procurement, or legal proportionality.

support_points: UIC article dated 2026-03-10 says the website presents objectives, approach, pilot activities, and latest updates; it links the public project flyer and reiterates four pilot activities including the railway pilot co-organised by UIC and Eurostar.
claim_ceiling_helped: Confirms public visibility of the website/flyer and adds partner-side wording on pilot activities and stakeholder audiences.
still_not_safe: Website-launch reporting is not a technical assessment, court record, procurement register, or buyer-side implementation proof.

support_points: HEAD 200 returns application/pdf with last-modified 2026-03-02; bounded pdftotext extraction confirms acronym, grant number 101225611, Horizon call/topic, coordinator UBITECH, and the same AI/privacy framing on the first pages.
claim_ceiling_helped: Adds one public downloadable project document with reproducible metadata and bounded text extraction.
still_not_safe: Brochure text is still project-controlled promotional documentation, not independent evaluation or procurement evidence.
